allow: Bash(cmd /c "where python 2>nul || where python3 2>nul || where node 2>nul || where npx 2>nul")
Bash(powershell -Command "Get-Command python,python3,node,npx -ErrorAction SilentlyContinue | Select-Object Name, Source")
Bash(powershell -Command "Get-Command dotnet,pwsh -ErrorAction SilentlyContinue | Select-Object Name, Source")
Bash(cmd /c "for %f in \(\\"C:\\Users\\user\\Documents\\AI 교육웹 개발\\"\) do echo %~sf")
Bash(powershell -ExecutionPolicy Bypass -Command "New-Item -ItemType Directory -Path 'C:\\Users\\user\\Documents\\AI 교육앱' -Force | Out-Null; Write-Output 'OK'")

Bash(keytool -genkeypair -v -keystore kimsilajang-release.keystore -alias kimsilajang -keyalg RSA -keysize 2048 -validity 10000 -dname 'CN=Kim Silajang, OU=AI Education, O=KimSilajang, L=Seoul, ST=Seoul, C=KR' -storepass kimsilajang2024! -keypass kimsilajang2024!)
